title: agropyron orientale subsp. lanuginosum
intro: Agropyron orientale subsp. lanuginosum, also known as sand dropseed, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of sand dropseed include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Sand dropseed can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
